message:
fix(parser): correct DCS param count and ShortDeviceControl display

vtparse: as_integer_params() now returns the actual integer parameter
count instead of using num_params which incorrectly included separator
entries (P(';')), causing an extra trailing 0 in DCS param arrays.

escape-parser: ShortDeviceControl Display no longer emits the string
terminator (\x1b\\), consistent with DeviceControlMode::Exit which
relies on the separate StringTerminator action. This fixes the double
terminator in round-trip encoding.

Fixes: generic_dcs_emits_enter_data_exit, short_dcs_round_trip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
